title: Tactus Procedure Runtime Migration
description:
## Intent
Adopt Tactus as the procedure runtime format and remove LuaDSL-era workflow/config coupling.

## Definition of Done
- Procedure configs support `class: Tactus` + `code:` execution path.
- `workflow:` is not used for Tactus procedures.
- Scorecard create procedure is implemented and runnable in Tactus format.
- MCP support exists for guidelines validation + scorecards list pagination metadata.
- Tests pass for changed areas and integration test is executed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Tracking implementation in task `plx-3fdf73` on branch `feature/tactus-procedure` (commit `a14786ffb229a552bb59091fd2ce259c5b7cb6dd`). Epic remains `in_progress` until PR merge.
